|death=Sometime between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]<ref name="Dates">{{JournalCite|1|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}} establishes that the "[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|Wanted by Cracken]]" segment of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' represents an [[in-universe]] update to the [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]'', the original version of which is presented in the sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]. The latter work is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that conflict to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the placement of the sourcebook therefore translates to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]. Furthermore, the installment of "Wanted by Cracken" in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]] establishes Candra [[Death|died]] after the Battle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], meaning they died sometime between 4 ABY and 7 ABY.</ref>

'''Candra''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[operative]]. They were [[Death/Legends|assassinated]] by the former Rebel Alliance [[Sniper/Legends|sharpshooter]] [[Ma'w'shiye]]—who had [[Treason/Legends|deserted]]—using a gun<ref name="Wanted" /> sometime between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].<ref name="Dates" /> Ma'w'shiye's assassination of Candra was later noted by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] in the traitor's entry of the [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]''<ref name="Wanted" />—the initial version of which was published in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].<ref name="Dates" />

==Behind the scenes==
Candra was first mentioned in the "[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|Wanted by Cracken]]" segment of the [[November]] [[1994]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|fourth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. The segment was authored by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]].<ref name="Wanted" />
